groups.label: Settlement / population / built environment
groups.interpretation: Too close is bad. For Trondelag the default source is a dissolved 250 m occupied grid-cell proxy derived from population centroids until true population points are available. Tettsted/built-centre and holiday-house centroids are optional advanced proxies.

groups.label: Transport infrastructure
groups.interpretation: Too close is bad. Trondelag mirrors Bornholm by splitting the N500 road network into medium and large road classes from vegkategor. N500 is used for light runtime; N250 remains a richer source candidate for later refinement.

groups.label: Electrical infrastructure / grid connection
groups.interpretation: Electrical layers are not wired for the Trondelag prototype yet.

groups.label: Valuable cultural environments
groups.interpretation: Culture layers mirror the Bornholm hard-exclusion pattern. Trondelag wires RA cultural heritage environments and NEA cultural landscapes as separate selectable sources; the merged NW layer remains QA-only to avoid duplicate scoring.

groups.label: Protected areas
groups.interpretation: Protected nature is treated as a hard exclusion following the Bornholm controller pattern. Trondelag currently wires the NEA Naturvern layer as the first protected-nature source; protected watercourses and water protection remain next-step candidates. Land-use classes such as forest, agriculture and wetland are intentionally kept out of this group for a later land-use controller.

groups.label: Airport approach / aviation restrictions
groups.interpretation: Aviation layers are not wired for the Trondelag prototype yet.

groups.label: Aviation bird-collision sensitivity
groups.interpretation: Aviation bird-collision layers are not wired for the Trondelag prototype yet.

groups.label: Military areas
groups.interpretation: Military layers are not wired for the Trondelag prototype yet.

groups.label: Coastal / strand protection
groups.interpretation: Coastal layers are not wired for the Trondelag prototype yet.

layers.label: Befolkning 250 m rutor (centroidproxy)
layers.note: Default Trondelag settlement source. Built as dissolved 250 m occupied grid cells from population-grid centroids, until true population points are available.

layers.label: Tettsted / built centre
layers.note: Advanced optional built-centre proxy. Off by default.

layers.label: Fritidshus centroid
layers.note: Advanced optional holiday-house proxy. Off by default.

layers.label: Mellanvägar
layers.note: Derived from Norwegian N500 vegkategor F. Mirrors Bornholm roads_medium for solar and wind filters.

layers.label: Stora vägar
layers.note: Derived from Norwegian N500 vegkategor E and R. Mirrors Bornholm roads_large for solar and wind filters.

layers.label: Kulturmiljoer och kulturminnen
layers.note: Norwegian RA cultural heritage environments. Mirrors Bornholm cultural_preservation as a culture hard-exclusion source.

layers.label: Vardefulla kulturlandskap
layers.note: Norwegian NEA cultural landscapes. Mirrors Bornholm valuable_cultural_environment as a culture hard-exclusion source.

layers.label: Naturvernområden
layers.note: Norwegian NEA Naturvern layer clipped and dissolved as the first Trondelag protected-nature controller. Forest, agriculture, wetland and other land-use classes are deliberately reserved for a later land-use controller.
